commentary:
Rodriguez Quinceañera is locked in for October 17 at Emerald Hall. Venue walkthrough is October 3. Carmen has the shot list, Mary has the waltz blocked, Hector has the playlist finalized.

Seven months of planning comes down to about four hours on the night. That's the job.

#QuinceañeraPlanning #MomentosByChris #LasVegasEvents

14 years in hotel housekeeping. Learned a few things.

The guests who leave the room trashed aren't the problem. The problem is a cart stocked wrong at 7 AM that puts your whole team behind by noon.

Prep beats hustle every time.

#HospitalityLife #HousekeepingSupervisor #GrandSierraHotel

Halloween block party is happening October 31 at the apartment complex pool area. Coordinating with building management on lighting and sound. Kids get a costume contest, adults get tamales and horchata.

If you're local and want to help set up, message me. We can always use hands.

#LasVegasCommunity #HalloweenParty

Selling conchas and polvorones this weekend to offset supplies for the Fuentes Quinceañera in November. My daughter Sofia's recipe, my mother's icing technique.

$12/dozen. Pick up at 4820 W Spring Valley Rd. DM to reserve.

All proceeds go directly into the event fund. No middleman.

#BakeSale #LasVegas #MomentosByChris

Two Quinceañeras booked back-to-back this fall. Rodriguez in October, Fuentes in November. Both families found me through word of mouth.

No ads. No agency. Just people talking to each other.

That's the business I want to run.

#SmallBusiness #EventPlanning #WordOfMouth #MomentosByChris

If you're planning a Quinceañera in Las Vegas and feeling overwhelmed — that's normal. There are 40 moving pieces and most vendors don't talk to each other.

That's what a coordinator is for. I manage the vendors so you can be present for your daughter.

Website: momentosbychris.com
Instagram: @momentosbychris

#QuinceañeraPlanner #LasVegasQuinceañera #MomentosByChris

Shout out to the housekeeping team at Grand Sierra. Q1 guest satisfaction scores for floors 12-18 came in highest in the building.

Not magic. Just consistent people who show up and do the work right.

#GrandSierraHotel #HospitalityTeam #ProudSupervisor
